function.message: You still owe the Emperor one finished squad and at least one real game night.
function.rulebook_notes: Bootstrapped with tree, root AGENTS.MD, and context; read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering cast and channels folders; exhaustively read every channel transcript as required by the task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity record in 10_entities/cast/lukas.md identifies the target as Lukas Brenner with alias `lukas`. Across all channel logs read under 60_outbox/channels, only 60_outbox/channels/grimdark_discord.md contains a message authored by `Lukas Brenner` with author_id `entity.lukas`, dated 2026-05-05. No later Lukas-authored message appears in any other channel file.
